label: Guardrails
description: Validate content against safety rules (PII, toxicity, prompt-injection). Calls the platform's DLP scanner API; falls back to local regex on failure.

settings.name: checks
settings.label: Checks to run
settings.description: Array of check names. Built-ins: pii, toxicity, injection.

ai.shortDescription: DLP / safety scan with regex fallback.
ai.whenToUse: Before sending generated content downstream — to catch PII, toxic output, or prompt-injection attempts.
ai.examplePrompt: guardrail-check the LLM output for PII before posting it to Slack
ai.promptHints: Reference {{steps.<id>.passed}} and {{steps.<id>.findings}}. action='redact' replaces content with [REDACTED] on violation.
